case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. GARBER & GARBER CONSULTING ENGINEERS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED MAY-02-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARBER, EDWARD M

CAUSE CALLED, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARBER & GARBER CONSULTING ENGINEERS, INC. GARBER, EDWARD M POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: SEE DETAIL IN TEXT, OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $4,426.75, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $114.68 DAMAGES, $775.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $159.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,048.68, TOTAL AMOUNT OF JUDGMENT - $5475.43 (DAMAGES OF $114.68 REPRESENTS INTEREST) ONE LEICA GPS S5510	1898 PL, WHICH EQUIPMENT COLLECTIVELY HAS A FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $9000 AND ITS IMMEDIATE POSSESSION, AND THAT PLTF. HAVE AND RECOVER SAID PROPERTY FROM DEFTS. IN THE EVENT PLTF. OBTAINS POSSESSION OF AND SELLS SAID PERSONAL PROPERTY, DEFTS. SHALL RECEIVE ALL CREDITS TO WHICH THEY ARE ENTITLED BY LAW.
